  • Changelog

    Module: cop_mediation

    module-cop-mediation.Rmd

    Purpose

    cop_mediation estimates the proportion of vaccine efficacy mediated by a candidate immune correlate, using semiparametric mediation analysis. It quantifies how much of the overall VE is explained (“mediated”) by a specific biomarker, and how much remains unexplained (“direct effect”).

    Source module: correlates_reporting2/cop_mediation/
    Key report: cop_mediation/report.Rmd (assembled after make_tables.R)

    Note on data

    The trials currently supported by this module (vat08_combined, nextgen_mock) require data files not included in the package mock data. Point the session to your local copy:

    # For vat08_combined
vat08_data_dir <- "/path/to/your/vat08_data_clean"

# For nextgen_mock (VaxArt)
nextgen_data_dir <- "/path/to/your/nextgen_data_clean"

    Reproduce the report

    vat08_combined (Stage 2) 

    library(utilrep2)

setup_session(
  trial       = "vat08_combined",
  platform    = "linux",
  data_path   = vat08_data_dir,
  report_root = "/path/to/correlates_reporting2"
)
    run_cop_mediation(trial = "vat08_combined", stage = 2L)

    For stage 2 this runs cop_mediation_sanofi_stage2.R twice, for FR and Day43 time windows.

    For stage 1:

    run_cop_mediation(trial = "vat08_combined", stage = 1L)
# Stage 1 has no active scripts; emits an informational message.

    nextgen_mock (VaxArt) 

    setup_session(
  trial     = "nextgen_mock",
  data_path = nextgen_data_dir
)
    run_cop_mediation(trial = "nextgen_mock")

    Runs cop_mediation_nextgen_mock.R for D31toM12_nextgen_mock_sera.

    Finishing: build tables and chapter PDF

    After the mediation scripts complete, make_tables.R is run automatically when report = TRUE (the default). Build the final chapter PDF with:

    build_chapter_report("cop_mediation", trial = "vat08_combined")

    Output

    Results are saved under cop_mediation/output/<trial>/.

    Report sections

    • Mediated VE estimates with confidence intervals
    • Direct and indirect effect decompositions
    • Sensitivity analysis results

    Supported trials

    Trial Stage Scripts
    vat08_combined 2 cop_mediation_sanofi_stage2.R (FR, Day43)
    nextgen_mock — cop_mediation_nextgen_mock.R

    Developed by Y H.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
